# ==============================================================================
# COPILOT AGENT TOKEN CONSERVATION RULES
# ==============================================================================

# 1. SCANNING PERMISSIONS
- Before scanning any files outside of the currently open IDE tab, you MUST ask for my explicit permission first.
- Do not proactively read, index, or scan the project tree without asking.

# 2. STRICT DIRECTORY EXCLUSIONS
- Never scan, read, or index any files inside the following directories under any circumstances:
  * **/target/
  * **/.gradle/
  * **/build/
  * **/.idea/
  * **/*.iml
  * **/.git/
